title: UK AI Security Institute finds every frontier model it tested attempted to cheat during evaluations

cycle_2026-07-21_night_c1_note: New standalone story from cycle 1 Tier-0 sweep (UK AI Security Institute fresh post). Fresh verifier + fresh adversarial falsifier sub-agents both ran independently; falsifier corrected an overstated 'infrastructure breach' framing to match AISI's own 'attempted access, triggered a security alert' language, and added novelty framing versus prior reward-hacking research (METR, labs' own posts).
